theme_strategy.description: A premium, dark-mode SaaS aesthetic combining deep navy/charcoal backgrounds with glowing electric blue and violet accents. The feel is 'God-Tier AI SaaS'—trustworthy, technical, and high-converting.

headings.styling: tracking-tight, high-contrast, premium tech feel. Avoid pure bold; use black/extra-bold for hero headers.

surfaces_and_components.glass_cards: Use 'Optical Clarity' glassmorphism: bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl. Never muddy.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white rounded-lg font-bold transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(37,99,235,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(37,99,235,0.6)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-white border border-white/10 rounded-lg transition-all

surfaces_and_components.forms: Use highly customized Shadcn inputs. bg-slate-950 border-slate-800 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500. Add subtle inner shadow. Inputs must feel premium, not default HTML.
surfaces_and_components.bento_grid: Use asymmetrical layouts for features (e.g., col-span-2 vs col-span-1). Avoid perfect squares everywhere.
surfaces_and_components.icons: Use lucide-react. Keep stroke width consistent (1.5 or 2).

patterns.scroll_reveal: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true }} transition={{ duration: 0.5, ease: 'easeOut' }}
patterns.stagger_children: Use transition={{ staggerChildren: 0.1 }} for grids and lists.
patterns.infinite_marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for slow-moving abstract tech/partner text bands.

media_assets.instruction: CRITICAL: The main agent MUST use these exact URLs in the React components. Do not use placeholders.

backgrounds.usage: Use as a very low opacity (10-15%) absolute background behind the hero section with mix-blend-overlay.
Use behind the metrics/trust section with a heavy dark gradient overlay (bg-slate-950/80).

header.logo: Text-based wordmark 'Workvyb' using Cabinet Grotesk, bold, white, with a blue dot or gradient accent.
header.cta: WhatsApp button with Lucide MessageCircle icon, green or brand blue.

hero.layout: Split grid (lg:grid-cols-2). Left: Copy + Lead Form. Right: Dashboard Visual.
hero.content_left: H1 with gradient text highlighting 'AI-enabled'. Subheadline. Trust badges (e.g., 'Trusted by 50+ Startups'). The lead form MUST be embedded here, inside a premium glass card. Form fields: Name, Mobile, Company, Role. Submit button.
hero.content_right_visual: DO NOT USE STOCK IMAGES. Build a customized React/Tailwind composition showing an 'AI Recruitment Pipeline'. Stacked overlapping cards (e.g., 'Candidate Match: 98%', avatars from media_assets, 'Interview Stage' chips) using framer-motion to float slightly.

problem.vibe: High contrast, Swiss Brutalist typography. Large text 'Hiring is broken.' Minimalist.
problem.layout: Centered, narrow max-width. Staggered fade-in text.

solution_benefits.style: Dark cards with subtle 1px border. On hover, apply a radial gradient glow behind the mouse (tracing beam effect) or just a subtle lift with blue shadow.

roles_we_hire.layout: 6 cards. Use 'Grid Borders' pattern (border-collapse style, where internal borders are visible but outer edges blend).
roles_we_hire.content: Sales, Marketing, Tech, Finance, Product, GTM. Include a clean list of 3-4 sub-roles per category.

why_workvyb.layout: Alternating text/image or modular blocks. Focus on AI matching, speed, quality.
why_workvyb.cta: Include a prominent CTA button to scroll back to the form.

recent_closures.layout: Horizontal scrollable flex container (hide scrollbar) or a masonry grid. 7 cards.
recent_closures.card_style: Terminal/Tech vibe. Include role name, generic company type (e.g., 'Series B SaaS'), timeline ('Closed in 14 days'). Use pill/badge components heavily here.

process.layout: Timeline. Vertical line on mobile, horizontal on desktop. Use glowing dots for nodes.
process.steps: 4 steps: Discovery, AI Sourcing & Match, Interview & Filter, Offer & Onboard.

comparison_table.layout: Standard table layout but styled like a pricing tier. 'Traditional Agencies' vs 'Workvyb'.
comparison_table.visuals: Muted gray text/X marks for Traditional. Bright white text/blue glowing checkmarks for Workvyb. Background of Workvyb column should be slightly lighter (bg-slate-900).

metrics_trust.layout: 3-4 large stats. Background uses 'metrics_trust_bg' from media_assets with a dark overlay.
metrics_trust.typography: Massive numbers (text-6xl or 7xl) with gradient fill.

faq.layout: Standard Shadcn Accordion, customized to have a dark aesthetic (border-b border-slate-800, white text).

footer.layout: Generous padding (py-20). Huge CTA 'Ready to build your dream team?'
footer.contact: Clearly display email contact@workvyb.com and WhatsApp 8010545225.

floating_whatsapp.style: Green background, bounce animation on load, tooltip 'Chat with us'. Link: https://wa.me/918010545225?text=Hi%20Workvyb

testing.instructions: All interactive elements (buttons, form inputs, form submit, accordion triggers, navigation links) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case. Examples: 'data-testid="hero-form-name"', 'data-testid="submit-lead-button"', 'data-testid="whatsapp-floating-cta"'.
